message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC skinparam classFontColor #333333 skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8 skinparam classHeaderFontColor #333333 skinparam classHeaderBorderSize 1 skinparam classHeaderBorderColor #CCCCCC skinparam classIconSize 20 skinparam classIconBackgroundColor #C8E6C9 skinparam classIconBorderColor #81C784 skinparam classIconFontColor #2E7D32 skinparam classIconFontName Arial skinparam classIconFontSize 14 skinparam classIconFontStyle bold skinparam classIconFontWeight bold skinparam classIconFontColor #2E7D32 skinparam classIconFontName Arial skinparam classIconFontSize 14 skinparam classIconFontStyle bold skinparam classIconFontWeight bold skinparam classIconFontColor #2E7D32 skinparam classIconFontName Arial skinparam classIconFontSize 14 skinparam classIconFontStyle bold skinparam classIconFontWeight bold class Person { + id: Long + firstName: String + lastName: String + telNr: String } class Booking { + id: Long + person: Person + trip: Trip } class Trip { + id: Long + destination: Destination + bus: Bus } class Bus { + id: Long + seats: int } class Destination { + id: Long + street: String + streetNo: int + place: String + zip: int } Person "1" -- "*" Booking : "bucht Reise (Trip)" Booking "*" -- "1" Trip : "hat Buchungen" Trip "1" -- "1" Bus : "Reise wird mit Bus durchgeführt" Trip "*" -- "1" Destination : "Reise geht nach" note top of Person C end note note top of Booking C end note note top of Trip C end note note top of Bus C end note note top of Destination C end note @enduml
